arts.ttl: Who is Josh Acheampong? The Chelsea wonderkid wanted by Real Madrid and PSG
arts.sum: The teenager is widely regarded as one of England’s most exciting young defenders and his development is being watched by numerous elite clubs amid his uncertain future at Chelsea. In October 2024, amid Acheampong’s contract standoff with Chelsea, Maresca told reporters: “I really think that Josh, potentially, can be a top player.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid possible lineup against Girona in LaLiga
arts.sum: For this match, Ancelotti has named a 21-man squad, including academy players Chema and Gonzalo . Alternatively, if Brahim starts on the right wing, Rodrygo could assume a false nine role, allowing Mbappé to play from the left, despite recently missing another penalty in the loss to Athletic.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo's Al-Nassr suffer dramatic loss to Al-Ittihad as ex-Spurs star nets stoppage-time winner - after Portuguese superstar earlier traded goals with former Real Madrid team-mate
arts.sum: Ronaldo popped up two minutes after Al-Ittihad had taken the lead with a goal of his own. Ultimately, though, it would be in vein, with a late goal meaning his opponents took all three points.
